title: Disclosed mandate and principal
doc_html:
SECTION 3.  RELATIONS BETWEEN THE PRINCIPAL, THE

MANDATARY, AND THIRD PERSONS

Subsection A.  Relations Between the Mandatary and Third Persons

Art. 3016.  Disclosed mandate and principal

A mandatary who contracts in the name of the principal within the limits of his authority does not bind himself personally for the performance of the contract.

Acts 1997, No. 261, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1998.
